echo.echo_optimiser module

class echo.echo_optimiser.EchoOptimiser(interval_duration, number_of_intervals, number_of_expansion_intervals, discount_rate, ES, objective_set, optimiser_engine=None, profile=None)

Bases: object

EchoOptimiser class.

interval_duration

Duration of each interval, in minutes

Type

int

number_of_intervals

Total number of intervals

Type

int

number_of_expansion_intervals

Number of expansion intervals

Type

int

discount_rate
Type

int

ES

Energy System Graph

Type

echo_models.OptimisationGraph

objective_set

Object containing a list of Optimisation objectives

Type

objectives.ObjectiveSet

optimiser_engine
profile
apply_constraints()
build_model()
build_objective()
df()

Extract all vars from the solution as a dataframe

df_by_node()

Returns a df of results by node, using the port names given in each nodes ‘ports’ dict

df_by_port()

Returns a df of results by port, using port names given in each nodes ‘ports’ dict

get_single_objective_total_value(objective_obj)

Returns the value of a single objective.

get_total_objective_at_port(port_obj)

Sums all objectives that take the defined port as their component.

get_total_objective_value()

Returns the value of the objective function.

node_values(node_obj, expansion_period=0)

Returns all values of all ports in a specified node for a single specified expansion period.

optimise(tee=False)
validate_network_graph()

Validates that a pyomo model can be built from the provided network graph. Checks for: - name consistency between objects (eg node.node_name) and graph nodes - others…

values(variable_name, expansion=0)

Returns the value of a single specified variable during a single specified expansion period.
